name: TroikaInitiative
description: A Roll20 API script automating the Troika! RPG's unique card-drawing initiative system, enabling smoother and faster gameplay with stylized feedback.
description_short: Automates the initiative system for Troika! RPG with a streamlined card-drawing mechanic.
instructions: Paste the script into your Roll20 API script editor. Use `!troika start` to initiate combat. See `!troika help` for all commands.
modifies_short: Manages initiative decks and combatants in Roll20.
